title: Malaysian Peach Salad
description: A refreshing salad that combines sweet and tangy flavors, perfect for warm weather. This recipe combines the best of Malaysian and Western cuisines.

ingredients.name: Peach
ingredients.notes: Use a variety like yellow or white peaches for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Mixed greens
ingredients.notes: You can also use baby spinach or arugula for a peppery flavor.

ingredients.name: Carrot
ingredients.notes: Shredded carrots add a nice crunch to the salad.

ingredients.name: Crispy fried shallots
ingredients.notes: You can make your own crispy fried shallots by slicing shallots thin and frying them in oil until crispy.

ingredients.name: Peanuts
ingredients.notes: Use peanuts for a classic Malaysian flavor.

ingredients.name: Peanut dressing
ingredients.notes: You can make your own peanut dressing by blending peanuts with soy sauce, lime juice, and honey.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium soy sauce for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Lime juice
ingredients.notes: Fresh lime juice adds a nice brightness to the salad.

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality honey for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for the best flavor.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the diced peaches, mixed greens, grated carrot, and crispy fried shallots.
In a small bowl, whisk together the peanut dressing, soy sauce, lime juice, and honey until well combined.
Pour the peanut dressing over the salad and toss to coat.
Sprinkle chopped peanuts over the salad and serve immediately.
You can also add some diced protein like grilled chicken or tofu for added flavor.
